posts.author: MemeWarsVet
posts.title: GM.

posts.raw_content:
Government should maintain electricity, water, roads, sanitation and borders.

Government should not be a platform for enacting ideological social-experimentation. We should not know the names of anyone in government, because it is not supposed to be a celebrity-parade.

The JANITOR class got carried away and became 'rulers'. These fuckers don't rule us. We rule them. Get back in line JANITORS.

The government is supposed to be facilities-management. I never want to see another person from 'government' on TV or in the newspaper again. If they appear there, they've sufficiently fucked up their government role to be fired on the spot.

I don't see my local-garage mechanic on TV. Why? Because he's not a fucking psychopath. He does his job so well that he does not need to broadcast how 'well' he's doing it.

He will die unknown, yet he will have done more to enrich America than anyone in our 'government'.

They've had more than a year to fix this. They've proven that they cannot.
posts.author: infinite-lives
posts.title: TEAR IT ALL DOWN: Our government needs to be stripped down to nothing and built back at the relevant-points as infrastructure fails. This way we can turn it back into what it should be: Our janitors.

posts.title: Progress: CDC no longer recommends routine COVID vaccination for children after FDA study finds increased risk of seizures - Willow Tohi

link_metadata.description: A peer-reviewed FDA study found a statistically significant increased risk of febrile seizures in young children within one day of receiving the Moderna COVID-19 vaccine. The risk was approximately 2.5 times higher for children aged 2-4 in the 0-1 days after vaccination compared to a later control period. A similar analysis for the Pfizer vaccine […]
link_metadata.title: Progress: CDC no longer recommends routine COVID vaccination for children after FDA study finds increased risk of seizures   – NaturalNews.com
